name: Atliera launch gate corpus v0
purpose: Selected deterministic fixture set for exercising launch-gate metrics before live/provider corpus selection. This is a validation harness input, not a launch-readiness claim.

entries.rationale: Minimal usable account graph that should satisfy deterministic provenance and quality thresholds.
Representative graph-backed Signals, Maps, and Plays fixture for shared-lens rendering coverage.
Structurally valid account graph used to calibrate low accepted-excerpt-rate launch-gate behavior.
Adversarial fixture proving invented source identifiers remain hard launch-gate failures.
Structurally valid zero-output account fixture proving empty outputs remain launch-gate failures.
